form.formComment: Drawn the inside alley. At the last start finished last on April 13 over 390m at this track behind Rumbling Rose beaten 11 lengths (23.26) in a T3 RSTW. Looks a solid hope.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Drawn the inside alley. At the last start finished last on April 13 over 390m at this track behind Rumbling Rose beaten 11 lengths (23.26) in a T3 RSTW. Looks a solid hope.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked and lost ground turning out of back straight.

form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at Warrnambool over 450m in 25.82 last start, beating Reiko Zoom. Ran one of the fastest times on the program in that last win. Stay with her.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Good effort at double-figure odds last time when third (23.12) over 400m at Geelong. Drawn close to the inside. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by a neck at this track over 450m (26.08) beating Infatuated in Maiden on April 13. Prepared to overlook.

formComments.comment: Strong performance after tracking the speed to win by a neck at this track over 450m (26.08) beating Infatuated in Maiden on April 13. Prepared to overlook.

form.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at Shepparton over 390m in 22.56. Followed that up with a minor placing over 460m at Warragul at Rank Limit - Restricted Win four days ago. Prepared to risk this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Contacted on first turn.

form.formComment: Recorded a 1.3 lengths win (25.67) in a T3 RSTW last time at Shepparton. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Looks a key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Most recently finished 5th in a T3 RSTW on April 16 over 450m at Shepparton behind Scott Vicious beaten 4 lengths (25.94). Major threat on best form.

form.formComment: Last start finished 4th over 450m at this track beaten 3.5 lengths (25.91) behind Laminate in a Rank Limit - Restricted Win on April 11. The form out of the last run measures up. Hard to beat.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (25.75) over 450m at Shepparton. Has been around the mark of late. Keep safe.
